support.title: Need help?

faq.title: Questions we hear often, answered
faq.description: Short and clear answers before you start.

items.question: How to create a contract
items.answer: You can create a documented electronic rental contract through Aqadi in simple steps: log in, enter both parties' and property details, then receive your contract documented via Ejar in just 30 minutes.

items.question: What is Aqadi platform?
items.answer: Aqadi is a licensed electronic platform by Ejar network and the Real Estate General Authority, enabling you to issue and document residential and commercial contracts in about 30 minutes.

items.question: Is the electronic contract from Ejar?
items.answer: Yes, all contracts created through Aqadi are directly linked to the official Ejar platform under the Ministry of Housing.

items.question: What are the fees for a one-year residential contract?
items.answer: The fee for a one-year residential contract is SAR 299 inclusive of VAT.

items.question: What are the fees for a one-year commercial contract?
items.answer: The fee for a one-year commercial contract is SAR 499 inclusive of VAT.

items.question: After creating the contract and paying the fees, when is it documented?
items.answer: The contract is documented instantly via Ejar after payment is completed and all parties give their electronic approval.

items.question: What services does the Aqadi app and website offer?
items.answer: Aqadi offers: creating residential and commercial rental contracts, documenting contracts via Ejar, renewing and terminating contracts, and fully managing properties and tenants.

items.question: Is Aqadi Real Estate licensed by the relevant authorities?
items.answer: Yes, Aqadi Real Estate is licensed by the Real Estate General Authority and accredited by the Ejar network under the Ministry of Housing.
